game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ダンガンロンパ 希望の学園と絶望の高校生 Anniversa (Danganronpa: Trigger Happy Havoc Anniversary):** Danganronpa is a mystery adventure game alternating between visual novel segments, investigation phases, and "Class Trials." During investigations, players tap on interactive hotspots in 2D environments to gather "Truth Bullets" (evidence and testimonies), which are stored in an inventory. The core gameplay unfolds in "Class Trials," where players engage in "Nonstop Debates" by tapping to fire a selected Truth Bullet at highlighted "weak points" (contradictions) in character dialogue, or swipe to cut through arguments in "Rebuttal Showdowns." Players have an "Influence Gauge" of 5 health points, which depletes with incorrect answers or missed opportunities, leading to a Game Over if it reaches zero. Progression is linear, advancing the narrative upon successfully solving each murder mystery, with trial difficulty escalating through faster dialogue, more complex contradictions, and tighter time limits on mini-games like "Logic Dive."
game_info.description: Welcome to Danganronpa: Trial of Truth! You are a student trapped in a deadly game where you must solve murder mysteries to survive. During the Nonstop Debate phase, statements scroll across the screen with highlighted weak points (contradictions). Use your collected Truth Bullets (evidence) to shoot at these weak points to expose the lies. You have 5 Influence Points - losing all means Game Over. Successfully expose all contradictions to win the trial and escape!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (←/→): Select Truth Bullet from inventory
Space: Fire selected Truth Bullet at weak point
Z: Absorb statement as new Truth Bullet (when available)
Enter: Start game from title screen
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction test. Tests if the player can navigate the Truth Bullet inventory and fire bullets at targets on screen.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Cycle through available Truth Bullets using arrow keys and fire them randomly at statements to verify the shooting mechanism works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should be able to switch between Truth Bullets and fire them. Game should register hits and misses appropriately. Test passes if inventory navigation and shooting mechanics function without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Tests the optimal strategy to complete a full trial by correctly matching Truth Bullets to contradictions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze each statement's weak point type and fire the corresponding Truth Bullet when the weak point is visible and reachable. Track which contradictions have been exposed and systematically work through all required targets.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All contradictions are successfully exposed without depleting Influence Points. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test is successful when the win screen appears showing "TRUTH REVEALED!"

TEST_3.test_description: Absorb mechanic test. Tests the Z key functionality to absorb statements as new Truth Bullets during the debate.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Monitor for absorbable statements (marked with special indicator) and press Z when they appear to collect them as new Truth Bullets in the inventory.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully absorb at least one statement. Verify it appears in the Truth Bullet inventory and can be used later. Test passes if absorption mechanic functions correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Lose condition test. Tests if the game properly handles running out of Influence Points.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally fire wrong Truth Bullets at weak points or miss opportunities to lose Influence Points until reaching zero.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Influence gauge depletes with each mistake. When it reaches zero, game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state showing "INFLUENCE DEPLETED!" Test is successful when lose condition triggers correctly.
